summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHP-based admin dashboard with glassmorphism UI. All core functionality working perfectly with beautiful modern design implementation.

backend_issues.notes: No backend testing required - this is a frontend-only PHP application with graceful database handling (shows appropriate warnings when DB not connected)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with glassmorphism UI and proper styling
Sidebar navigation works for all pages (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Customers, Settings, Coupons, Reports, Shipments)
Theme toggle (dark/light) works with smooth transitions
Large text toggle accessibility feature works
High contrast toggle accessibility feature works
Statistics cards display with proper glassmorphism effects
Recent orders table displays correctly with empty state
Hover effects and animations work on all interactive elements
Glass effects (blur, transparency, backdrop-filter) are fully functional
Navigation between all pages works correctly
User menu and logout button work correctly
Oude Admin navigation link present and functional
All required navigation items present and working
CSS variables and theme system working properly
Responsive glassmorphism design adapts to theme changes
